title: Street Greetings
speaking: Har bir iborani ovoz chiqarib 3 marta ayting.
2 ta yangi so‘z bilan o‘zingiz gap tuzing.

exercises.prompt: So‘zlarni tarjimasi bilan moslang.

quiz.question: Ushbu gapning tarjimasini tanlang: “Hello, how are you?”
Ushbu gapning tarjimasini tanlang: “I’m fine, thank you.”
quiz.explanation: Bu gapning to‘g‘ri tarjimasi: “Men yaxshiman, rahmat.”.

quiz.question: Ushbu gapning tarjimasini tanlang: “See you later.”
Ushbu gapning tarjimasini tanlang: “Thank you very much.”
Ushbu gapning tarjimasini tanlang: “Excuse me, please.”
Ushbu gapning tarjimasini tanlang: “Sorry, I’m late.”
quiz.explanation: Bu gapning to‘g‘ri tarjimasi: “Kechirasiz, kech qoldim.”.

title: Introducing Yourself
